# Security Checklist: Toggle Open-Data Layers in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Validate safe error handling and data integrity for layer toggles.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/025-open-data-layers/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Layer API outages do not leave broken overlays.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Invalid layer or bbox requests return safe errors.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Layer API failures are logged for monitoring.
